en: Leslie, go home. No, I can't. I can't go home. I have to get ready for the Chamber of Secrets.
If this meeting does not go perfectly, then the Harvest Festival is going to be over before it began. I cannot go home.
ko: 이 회의가 완벽하게 진행되지 않으면, 수확 축제는 시작도 하기 전에 끝날 거야.

en: Okay, then who's your doctor? Anne's my doctor. And she's the most beautiful nurse in the world.
Come on. Oh, God, now I'm hot. Now it's really hot in here.
Leslie, I typed your symptoms into the thing up here, and it says you could have network connectivity problems.
ko: 레슬리, 네 증상을 여기 입력했더니, 네트워크 연결 문제일 수 있다고 나와.
